title: Firework Variants
description: This resource pack gives firework rockets and firework stars different textures depending on the firework components.
body:
This Resource Pack is part of P&S Variated Item Pack. 

If you want more variated items like this resource pack, check [P&S Variated Item Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/HP6d4QQ9)!

## Texture variants
![Firework Rocket Texture Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96b74090ee6387c888961dfb89b77e1ca0de9532.png)
![Firework Star Texture Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6736ed9a1f451645395dd039150dfdf5cb824991.png)
![Firework Crossbow Texture Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/040cf7e59b63de83d616b2eb64f3cf67c8e2b961.png)
This resource pack gives firework rockets and firework stars different textures depending on the firework components.

### Texture variants include:
- Firework rocket (Explosion Count, Explosion Shape, Explosion Effect, Explosion Color, Flight Duration, Flight Fuse Remove)
- Firework star (Explosion Shape, Explosion Effect [Twinkle, Trail])
- Firework crossbow (Firework rocket, Multishot)

### Resource Pack Limitation:
- Firework rocket with multiple colors or multiple explosions do not support firework color
- Firework rocket that dosen't support firework color also dosen't support firework crossbow
